title: ionidium glutinosum var. parviflorum
intro: Ionidium glutinosum var. parviflorum, also known as small-flowered Ionidium, is a plant species that belongs to the primrose family (Primulaceae). This plant is traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ionidium glutinosum var. parviflorum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
